name: AROS Retail Operations

write: draft AROS action only; no direct POS mutation

operator.data: operator-scoped connected app and POS data

regulars.data: business-approved profile, catalog, promotions, hours, website, map, social, support, legal, QR/deep link, and assistant install links

regularsPolicy.readOnlyGuarantee: Regulars cannot change business profiles, connector state, POS data, orders, carts, checkout, payments, or external pages.

reviewDemo.credentials: No real POS credentials or customer data

submissionBlockers: Register Claude OAuth client after hosted connector UI provides redirect URI
Run production token test and then set AROS_MCP_DEMO_MODE=false
Counsel signoff for public legal pages
